cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +2.26% · Gold +1.61% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 34% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.45%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.45%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.83%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.80%, ISRG +5.61%, AAPL +4.61%, ADBE +4.28%, ADBE +4.28%. Laggards: TER -12.83%, KLAC -11.20%, AMBA -10.57%, CEVA -10.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.66% at $160.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
